sql_array: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, amount NUMERIC, transaction_date DATE);
SELECT SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY transaction_date) AS daily_total FROM sales;
UPDATE sales SET amount = amount * 1.05 WHERE transaction_date = '2023-01-01';
SELECT transaction_date, SUM(amount) OVER (ORDER BY transaction_date ROWS BETWEEN 1 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_total FROM sales;
